patterns: how many medicines are low in stock
show me out of stock items
responses: I've analyzed the inventory. You can view all 'Low Stock' items directly in the 'Medicines' menu. To add a new product, click the 'Add Medicine' button in the top right of the catalogue.
The inventory status is currently updated. For a detailed view of out-of-stock items, I recommend checking the 'Resource Alerts' section. Would you like me to take you there?
The sales analytics are ready. You can view the full revenue breakdown in the 'Sales' section. Today's top-selling category appears to be Analgesics.
Your financial dashboard provides real-time tracking of income and sales volume. For a PDF report, please navigate to 'Sales' and click the Export button.

patterns: how to add a new staff
responses: Staff management is restricted to Admin roles. You can manage permissions and add new accounts in the 'User Registry' menu.
To update a staff member's role or status, please visit the 'User Registry'. Only authorized administrators can perform these actions.
Yes, I've flagged a few items nearing expiry. Please visit the 'Resource Alerts' section for the full list of priority notifications.
Check the 'Resource Alerts' tab. I've highlighted several batches that require immediate attention due to low stock or upcoming expiration.
Hello! I am your PharmaTrack Operational Assistant. I'm here to help you manage the pharmacy, track sales, and monitor stock levels. What can I do for you today?
Greetings! I'm ready to assist with your administrative tasks. Whether you need an inventory summary or a sales report, I'm here to streamline your workflow.
